lesson.title: Hello, Mallam
lesson.subject: Lumo Fundamentals
lesson.readinessFocus: Guided greeting, pointing, and short spoken answers.
lesson.scenario: The learner meets Mallam, learns the greeting ritual, points to the right card, and answers one calm readiness question entirely from bundled offline content.

activitySteps.title: Mallam says hello
activitySteps.prompt: Mallam says, Hello. Listen first, then say hello back.
activitySteps.hint: Use a wave and model the greeting once before asking the learner to repeat it.
activitySteps.detail: First contact with the tutor voice and the hello routine.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner attempts a greeting in any clear form.
activitySteps.successFeedback: Mallam heard a greeting. Keep the lesson moving.
activitySteps.retryFeedback: Say hello once more with the learner.
facilitatorNotes: Keep the pace slow and friendly.

activitySteps.title: Find Mallam
activitySteps.prompt: Tap the picture that shows Mallam.
activitySteps.hint: If the learner hesitates, name each card once without rushing.
activitySteps.detail: The learner identifies Mallam from a simple three-card set.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner can pick the guided character card with one cue.
facilitatorNotes: One cue is enough. Do not turn it into a test.
Praise the learner for pointing clearly.

activitySteps.title: Who are you meeting?
activitySteps.prompt: Mallam asks, Who are you meeting? Say: Mallam.
activitySteps.hint: Tap the wave card if the learner needs a visual reminder.
activitySteps.detail: Short one-word answer after a spoken prompt.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner says Mallam with or without final prompting.
facilitatorNotes: If needed, gesture to yourself and then to Mallam.

activitySteps.title: Choose the ready card
activitySteps.prompt: Tap the card that says, I am ready.
activitySteps.hint: Read the two cards aloud before the learner chooses.
activitySteps.detail: Pairs a short text choice with the readiness ritual.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner can match the spoken phrase to the right prompt card.
facilitatorNotes: Keep this light. The goal is recognition, not spelling.
Repeat the two phrases once if needed.

activitySteps.title: Say your ready phrase
activitySteps.prompt: Say: I am ready to learn.
activitySteps.hint: Point to each word slowly and let the learner echo it back.
activitySteps.detail: The learner closes with the first full confidence phrase.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner attempts the full readiness phrase with support if needed.
facilitatorNotes: Replay the phrase once before prompting a second try.
